name: betynz-web
description: Betynz live football product with 16 Olympian engines, Leonidas and Spartacus Rebel engines, six-day coverage, adaptive enrichment, deity engine pages, persistent workflows and a refined dashboard match board.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check rebel-engine-core.js && node --check olympian-engine-core.js && node --check scripts/seed-guard.js && node --check scripts/fetch-data.js && node --check scripts/select-enrichment-plan.js && node --check scripts/merge-enriched-data.js && node --check scripts/enrich-xg.js && node --check scripts/build-snapshot.js && npm run test:rebels && npm run validate
